query: SELECT table_name, table_rows, ROUND(data_length/1024/1024, 2) AS data_mb, ROUND(index_length/1024/1024, 2) AS index_mb, ROUND((data_length+index_length)/1024/1024, 2) AS total_mb FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema = DATABASE() ORDER BY total_mb DESC;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3RYRgiKBksaJ9ku.59f06284f1f2 --database BXEkPAJgGiqWs3v7muUPfr --execute SELECT table_name, table_rows, ROUND(data_length/1024/1024, 2) AS data_mb, ROUND(index_length/1024/1024, 2) AS index_mb, ROUND((data_length+index_length)/1024/1024, 2) AS total_mb FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema = DATABASE() ORDER BY total_mb DESC;
